study.name: plant metagenome
study.title: fungal communities associated with Populus deltoides and Populus trichocarpa x deltoides
study.description: Thirty different niches across trees (leaf, stem, roots, soil) for P. deltoides and P. trichocarpa x deltoides genotypes were sampled.
